text.title: Email Lifecycle Architecture Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Email Lifecycle Architecture.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS with welcome, newsletter, product-updates, dunning — four senders, two suppression lists.
example.trace: inventory (4 programs) → map (acquisition×1, engagement×2, retention×1) → cap (4/week) → suppression consolidated → consent backfill 92% → quarterly audit booked
